film.title: Tom, Dick and Harry
film.overview: Janie is a telephone operator who is caught up in the lines of love of three men: car salesman Tom, Chicago millionaire Dick and auto mechanic Harry. But Janie just can't seem to make up her mind between them. While fantasizing about her futures with each of the men, Janie spends her time desperately trying to juggle between them until she can make a decision.

dialogues.dialogue: Waghmare... - Shame! Shame! Shut down the police station Shame on the policemen Sir, the crowd is growing
Waghmare... - Shame! Shame! Shut down the police station Shame on the policemen Sir, the crowd is growing Drive them away Shut the doors. - How can we shut the doors

I don't want condoms. Better explain to him, you mutt...I don't want boxes, I want cash, 3000 Box... doesn't want... cash? Shame on you, Happy uncle Men without wives appreciate it's importance...the significance of which is lost on married men of your ilk You know,
dialogues.cause_raw: not understanding the importance of condoms

dialogues.dialogue: You've set my heart rocking Swing to it, swing D**k boy...I'm rather ashamed to speak your name Look at your belly and mine... how can you see, let me explain Your belly, flat like an expressway

Now that we are here, we'll touch here, there...Don't touch me! - We'll even apologize on your behalf Now go on, clean the tables. - Pushing a blind man, eh? Aren't you ashamed? Don't you touch me! - Come on Where are you going? - Celina belongs to me
Who is the bad man of all? - Soprano You are the worst. - Soprano! Hear that? The greatest villain hangs his head in shame today because of you Two Seven Nineteen

But we have no idea who you love. Tell us...who is the fortunate one amongst us? - It's me Tell me, baby. - Shut up You ought to be ashamed of your actions. I'm trying to help you guys How could you malign me? - But it's not our fault You are so nice, so caring, that all of us fell for you
Still, a threesome blind-mute-and-deaf defeated me? Some Tom-D**k-and-Harry defeated Soprano Shame on me Kill me, somebody shoot me Someone, give me a bullet, please
